name: bugfix-extended-v2
description: Investigates a bug report, develops a fix through coder and reviewer turns, verifies the result, and reports the final status.

name: bugfix-pr-fixer-autosubmit-v2
description: Claims a bugfix task, repairs it with review, and prepares an autosubmitted pull request when the fix is ready.

name: bugfix-pr-fixer-direct-v2
description: Runs a direct bugfix pull-request workflow for a known task, using coder and reviewer agents to produce and verify a change.

name: bugfix-pr-fixer-v2
description: Claims a bugfix project work item, fixes it with a coder/reviewer loop, and prepares the project for pull-request follow-up.

name: bugfix-v2
description: Takes a bug description, asks an agent to diagnose and fix it in the project, then verifies and reports the outcome.

name: claim-check-spike-v2
description: Explores whether project issue claiming and follow-up work queues behave correctly for a small spike workflow.

name: document-creation
description: Creates or revises a project document through agent drafting and review, then writes the accepted document to the project.

name: durable-memory-consolidation-v2
description: Consolidates durable project memory from recent work so future sessions can recover important context quickly.

name: example-v2
description: Demonstrates a simple multi-step workflow with agent work and review for smoke testing and template examples.

name: image-qa
description: Reviews image or visual output against expected criteria and produces a QA verdict with evidence.

name: info-qa
description: Runs an information-oriented QA workflow that checks project facts, evidence, and expected outcomes without modifying the project.

name: newspaper
description: Builds a newspaper-style summary from project or external inputs, organizing findings into a readable generated artifact.

name: pr-fix
description: Claims one project issue, reads the failing test chapter, fixes the project with coder/reviewer loop, commits, and closes the issue.

name: pr-followup-v2
description: Follows up on pull-request feedback, applies needed changes, verifies them, and reports whether the PR is ready.

name: provider-probe
description: Checks whether configured AI providers and team members can respond successfully in the current environment.

name: qa-suite
description: Runs project QA chapters, interprets failures, creates project issues for failing chapters, and reports the open issue count.

name: research
description: Fans a research question out to three researchers in parallel, then has Lead consolidate one final answer.

name: spec-driven-task
description: Turns a written task specification into project changes through agent implementation, review, and verification.

name: triage-v2
description: Triages incoming issues, filters duplicates or unclear reports, assesses fixability, and produces candidate work items.
